extraction.one_line_summary: URÁN Rigoberto won stage 9 after crashing with MARTIN Dan on descent, damaging his derailleur and sprinting in his 53x11 gear only
tactical_patterns: FROOME Chris pre-identified stage 9 months before as decisive opportunity, earmarked Mont du Chat descent specifically to pressure rivals.
ARU Fabio attacked final climb when FROOME had mechanical, ignoring unwritten rules—correct 2017 tactical choice according to commentary.
FUGLSANG Jakob cooperating with yellow jersey FROOME on chase instead of letting him work alone inexplicably hurt teammate ARU.
MATTHEWS Michael positioned for green jersey points on mountain stage with SUNWEB support, showing sprint teams adapting to classification opportunities.

rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: descending Mont du Chat at speeds rivals couldn't match revealed technical skill as weapon, gained 4 seconds on ARU
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: crashed at 45mph on descent trying to follow FROOME's pace, exposed technical descending weakness versus GC rivals
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: crashed at 45mph with PORTE, still remounted and finished in second group showing exceptional resilience
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: positive: won stage despite derailleur destroyed in crash, limited to 53x11 gear for sprint yet still out-kicked BARGUIL
rider_signals.ARU Fabio: negative: had FUGLSANG support but lacked legs to follow BARGUIL's final 12km attack, losing 4 seconds to FROOME
rider_signals.BARGUIL Warren: positive: attacked final 12km solo on fumes, nearly held off group sprint despite no teammates, aggressive racing pattern
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: lost over 2 minutes to FROOME, falling significantly behind in GC on stage leader pre-identified as critical
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: crashed early stage and abandoned, removing key FROOME mountain support on hardest stage of race
